name_en: M46288 Monogram Empreinte embossed CarryAll small bag, featuring a spacious layout with a neat interior and a large interior pocket for added functionality. Paired with a Monogram embossed zip clutch secured by a leather strap. A perfect companion for urban life. Dimensions 29 x 24 x 12 cm (Length x Height x Width)
